About.missionP1: Syntax Studio takes full responsibility for your digital growth. We go beyond websites – delivering everything from Google Ads and targeted campaigns to professional video production, 2D animation, and high-end photography.
About.missionP2: We combine technical precision with creative content. Whether it's After Effects animations, Photoshop design, or hand-coded web apps, we ensure your brand stands out and converts.

simple.title: Keep it simple

WorkIntro.title: How we work
WorkIntro.defaultOverview: We act as your outsourced marketing department. From strategy and Google Ads to professional video production and web development – we take full responsibility for your digital growth.
WorkIntro.defaultBackground: We often see businesses with great products but no cohesive strategy. We bring everything together – design, content, advertising, and technology – into one integrated machine that actually converts.

giroo.heading: Full Responsibility for Giroo's Marketing & Growth
paragraphs: We took over full responsibility for Giroo's digital presence. This included everything from branding and a full Next.js app to targeted Google Ads and professional video production for social media.
Through a combination of high-performance code, animated explainer videos, and data-driven advertising, we helped Giroo go from idea to a robust platform with a growing user base.

riseup.heading: Logo Redesign for RiseUp
paragraphs: We redesigned RiseUp's logo to give them a modern and professional look that reflects their important work.
The process involved simplifying elements while preserving the core message, resulting in a more versatile and recognizable brand.

page.title: Modernizing RiseUp
page.description: A logo is the heart of any brand. For RiseUp, it was about taking the step from traditional to something that feels modern and future-proof.
page.philosophyDesc: RiseUp is an organization prioritizing youth with a difficult upbringing. We wanted the logo to reflect their mission of lifting and supporting these young individuals. The new design combines strength with warmth, symbolizing growth, inclusion, and new opportunities.
page.visualModernizationDesc: Cleaner lines and optimized geometry for all scales.
page.multiPlatformDesc: Designed to thrive on mobile, print, and large scale banners.
page.strategyDesc: Simplification, better readability, and a modern color palette that works across all platforms.
page.deliverablesDesc: Complete logo package with variants for web, print, and social media.

renovera.heading: Complete Digital Presence for Renovera
paragraphs: We built a modern website for Renovera that focuses on their craftsmanship. This included web development, editing a professional promotional film, and assistance with project documentation.
Through clear before/after imagery and engaging video content, we've made it easier for potential clients to see the value in their services.

jonk.heading: Professional Content for Jønk
paragraphs: For Jønk, we delivered a comprehensive series of high-end videos and product photos. The goal was to highlight their 'professional grade' products through a visual style that exudes quality.
Through tailored video production and professional photography, we created a content library that strengthens Jønk's brand across all digital channels.

page.title: High-Energy Campaign Delivery
page.description: Jønk is a bold, urban burger brand built on quality and attitude. We delivered a comprehensive high-energy campaign designed to dominate social media, featuring 5 custom-tailored 4K ads and 50+ high-end product photos that capture the raw energy of the kitchen and the perfect smash burger.
page.spiritDesc: Punchy, fast-paced content we produced to capture the raw energy of the kitchen and the crunch of the perfect smash burger.
page.photoDesc: We delivered a complete library of 50+ edgy product shots and posters designed for social media, print, and digital menus—all keeping the urban Jønk identity front and center.
page.strategyDesc: Focusing on raw materials, high heat, and textures. We highlighted the 'crunch' and clean flavors to communicate quality through a high-energy delivery that matches Jønk's edgy vibe.
page.deliverablesDesc: A high-performance library of 5 cinematic 4K social ads and 50+ high-resolution photos tailored for maximum engagement on Reels and TikTok.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to what you're wondering about.

timeline.a: A simple website can be ready in 1–2 weeks. Larger projects with filming and ads typically take 3–6 weeks.

cost.a: The price depends on scope. A simple static page starts from $100, while a complete business package with filming starts from $1,500.

changes.q: Can I make changes along the way?
changes.a: Yes! We work with close dialogue and include revision rounds in all projects. You see the work as it progresses.

support.q: Do I get help after launch?
support.a: Absolutely. We offer maintenance agreements and are always available for updates and support.

tech.a: We use modern tools like React, Next.js, and Tailwind. Everything is hand-coded for optimal performance.
